categories.label: FINANCE
categories.blurb: Loans, tax, savings, and everyday money math.

categories.label: EVERYDAY
categories.blurb: Quick, practical tools for daily use.

tools.title: Currency Converter
tools.blurb: Live exchange rates between world currencies.

tools.title: Loan / EMI Calculator
tools.blurb: Monthly payment and total interest, any currency, years or months.

tools.title: Car Loan Calculator
tools.blurb: Monthly payment with trade-in value and sales tax.

tools.title: Mortgage Calculator
tools.blurb: Monthly payment with property tax, insurance, and PMI.

tools.title: Refinance Calculator
tools.blurb: Compare your current loan against a new rate and term.

tools.title: Rent vs. Buy Calculator
tools.blurb: Net cost of renting vs. buying, with a break-even year.

tools.title: Tax Calculator
tools.blurb: Income tax estimate by country, with deductions and regimes.

tools.title: Paycheck Calculator
tools.blurb: Take-home pay per paycheck, after tax and payroll deductions.

tools.title: GST / VAT Calculator
tools.blurb: Add or remove GST/VAT for 8+ countries.

tools.title: Investment Calculator
tools.blurb: SIP, SWP, compound growth, and CAGR.

tools.title: SIP Calculator
tools.blurb: Systematic investment plan maturity value, with step-up.

tools.title: Compound Interest Calculator
tools.blurb: Compound growth with optional monthly contributions.

tools.title: Savings Goal Calculator
tools.blurb: How long to reach a goal, or how much to save monthly.

tools.title: Retirement Calculator
tools.blurb: Retirement balance projection, with employer match.

tools.title: Net Worth Calculator
tools.blurb: Total assets minus liabilities.

tools.title: Discount Calculator
tools.blurb: Sale price, savings, or the original price in reverse.

tools.title: Tip Calculator
tools.blurb: Split a bill by percentage and number of people.

tools.title: FD Calculator
tools.blurb: Fixed deposit maturity with quarterly compounding (India).

tools.title: RD Calculator
tools.blurb: Recurring deposit maturity on monthly deposits (India).

tools.title: PPF Calculator
tools.blurb: 15-year tax-free Public Provident Fund growth (India).

tools.title: HRA Calculator
tools.blurb: House rent allowance exemption, metro or non-metro (India).

tools.title: Break-Even & Profit Margin Calculator
tools.blurb: Units to break even, plus gross margin and markup.

tools.title: Debt Payoff Calculator
tools.blurb: Snowball vs. avalanche payoff strategy comparison.

tools.title: Salary Calculator
tools.blurb: Convert pay between hourly, weekly, monthly, and annual.

tools.title: Sales Tax Calculator
tools.blurb: Add sales tax to a price, or back it out from a total.

tools.title: CD Calculator
tools.blurb: Certificate of deposit maturity value and APY (US).

tools.title: Amortization Schedule Calculator
tools.blurb: Full payment-by-payment principal vs. interest breakdown for any loan.

tools.title: 401(k) Calculator
tools.blurb: Retirement balance projection with employer match and contribution %.

tools.title: IRA & Roth IRA Calculator
tools.blurb: Growth projection and traditional vs. Roth tax comparison.

tools.title: House Affordability Calculator
tools.blurb: Maximum home price from your income, debts, and down payment.

tools.title: Down Payment Calculator
tools.blurb: How much to save, and whether you'll owe PMI.

tools.title: Debt-to-Income Ratio Calculator
tools.blurb: The ratio lenders use to judge how much more you can borrow.

tools.title: Simple Interest Calculator
tools.blurb: Interest and total payable on principal, rate, and time — no compounding.

tools.title: ROI Calculator
tools.blurb: Return on investment, annualized return, from cost, gain, and time.

tools.title: Credit Card Payoff Calculator
tools.blurb: Months to pay off a card, or the payment needed to hit your target date.

tools.title: BMI Calculator
tools.blurb: Body mass index from height and weight.

tools.title: Calorie / BMR Calculator
tools.blurb: BMR and daily calorie needs by activity level.

tools.title: Macro Calculator
tools.blurb: Protein, carb, and fat targets in grams.

tools.title: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator
tools.blurb: Due date, current week, and trimester.

tools.title: Ovulation Calculator
tools.blurb: Ovulation day and fertile window estimate.

tools.title: Ideal Weight Calculator
tools.blurb: Healthy weight range across four medical formulas.

tools.title: Body Fat Calculator
tools.blurb: Body fat percentage from tape-measure circumferences (US Navy method).

tools.title: GPA Calculator
tools.blurb: GPA on the 4.0, 5.0, or 10.0 scale, by credit hours.

tools.title: Grade Calculator

tools.title: Scientific Calculator
tools.blurb: Trig, logs, powers, roots, and memory keys.

tools.title: Fraction Calculator

tools.blurb: Mean, median, mode, range, variance, and standard deviation.

tools.title: Percentage Calculator
tools.blurb: Find X% of Y, or what percent A is of B.

tools.title: Age Calculator
tools.blurb: Exact age in years, months, and days.

tools.blurb: Exact days, weeks, and business days between two dates.

tools.title: Time Calculator
tools.blurb: Add or subtract durations, and total hours worked from clock times.

tools.title: Unit Converter

tools.title: Week Number Calculator

tools.title: CM to Inches
